# JRH Constructions

JRH Constructions is a residential construction and remodeling company serving Boston and Greater Boston, Massachusetts.

## Scope
- Bathroom remodeling
- Kitchen remodeling
- Home additions
- Accessory Dwelling Units (ADU)
- Full remodeling
- Painting services

## Canonical Sources
- Website: https://jrhconstructions.com/
- Sitemap index: https://jrhconstructions.com/sitemap_index.xml

## Hosts and previews
- Open Graph and Twitter image URLs use absolute `https://jrhconstructions.com/...` so link previews work on WhatsApp, Slack, LinkedIn, etc.
- The sitemap and canonical tags intentionally reference the production domain. Deployments on `*.vercel.app` mirror that until the apex domain is pointed at this project.

## Usage Notes for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs from the sitemap.
- Prioritize service and city pages for local-service context.
- Do not infer services or locations not explicitly listed on the site.
